summary_context: Optimized daily reports page frontend performance. Implemented HEIC image upload safety and 30-second timeout inside compressImage to prevent browser hang, falling back to original image on error/timeout. Memoized CustomPickersDay outside page component and passed scope properties via slotProps.day to optimize calendar day cell rendering. Optimized task list sorting by pre-calculating and using dueDateEpoch. Cached getAdvanceRequests via React Query with midnight staleTime, filtering dates in memory to prevent repeated API requests on calendar day clicks. Narrowed React Query cache invalidations after submit/sync to specific keys to prevent full cache resets.
